Package i5.cb.api

Class CBIOException

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Throwable
      • java.lang.Exception
        • i5.cb.CBException
          • i5.cb.api.CBIOException
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    CBConnectionBrokenException, CBConnectionException, CBMessageException, CBTimeOutException

    public class CBIOException
extends CBException
    Thrown to indicate that an IO Exception appeared. Applications can subclass this class to indicate similar exceptions.
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      CBIOException​()
      Constructs a CBIOException with no detail message.
      CBIOException​(java.lang.String s)
      Constructs a CBIOException with the specified detail message.

      • CBIOException
